# MythRealms — Curated Natural Stone Bracelets

## Key Pages
- Home: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app
- Curated Singles: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/collections/curated-singles
- Copper Braid Collection: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/collections/copper-braid-series
- Golden Luxe Collection: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/collections/golden-luxe-series
- Dark Mineral Collection: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/collections/dark-mineral-series
- Pearl & Crystal: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/collections/pearl-crystal-series
- About: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/about
- Blog: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/blog

## About
MythRealms creates handcrafted natural stone bracelets — each bead hand-selected,
each piece artisan-finished. We source amethyst, rose quartz, black obsidian,
moonstone, tiger's eye, and more from ethical mines worldwide. Every bracelet
is strung and inspected by hand, carrying the quiet energy of the stone and the
intention of its maker.

## Collections
- Curated Singles: 12 one-of-a-kind hand-selected bracelets (Blush Rose, Turquoise Dream, Golden Accent, Pearl Drop, Dark Stone, Amber Bead, and more)
- Copper Braid Collection: 12 hand-braided copper bracelets with warm sunset patina
- Golden Luxe Collection: 13 light-luxury gold-accent bracelets for everyday elegance
- Dark Mineral Collection: 14 deep charcoal and volcanic mineral stone bracelets
- Pearl & Crystal: 3 luminous freshwater pearl and faceted crystal strands

## Facts
- Every bracelet handcrafted to order (2-5 business day processing)
- Free shipping on orders over $69.99
- Ships to 36 countries
- 30-day return policy
- Pricing: $26.49 - $53.99
